title: Getting Started with Kibana Dashboards
author: bltauthor000000001a
abstract_l10n: Learn how to create interactive dashboards in Kibana to visualize your Elasticsearch data effectively.
body_l10n:
Kibana is a powerful visualization tool that lets you explore your Elasticsearch data.

Creating Your First Dashboard

Start by navigating to the Dashboard section in Kibana. You can add visualizations, saved searches, and maps to build comprehensive views of your data.

Adding Visualizations

Click the Add panel button to select from existing visualizations or create new ones directly within the dashboard.

seo.seo_title_l10n: Getting Started with Kibana Dashboards | Elastic Blog
seo.seo_description_l10n: Learn how to create interactive dashboards in Kibana.
